hooks.name: API Postman Testing
hooks.description: Monitors API source code changes and automatically runs Postman collection tests to validate functionality

action.prompt: API source code or configuration has been modified. Please retrieve the contents of the .postman.json file. If the file does not exist or is empty, create a Postman collection for the API. If it exists, get the collection ID and run the collection, showing me the results and propose fixes for any errors found.
